titleStmt.title: SII 23.307: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 307. (A.R. No. 307 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kōnērinmaikoṅḍāṉ: year 22

summary.p: The king meant here is evidently Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III with his Tirumandiravōlai Mīnavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ mentioned as signatory at the end. The inscription is dated in the 320th day of the year, and records a royal gift of 2 vēli of land in Irumarabuntūya-Perumāḷ-nallūr in Tiraimūr-nāḍu as tirunāmattukkāṇi and as tax-free dēvadāna for the expenses of worship to the image of Piḍāri Yōgīrunda (Yōgīndra)-Paramēśvari set up in the fourth prākāra of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tri[bhuva]ṉaccakkaravartti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyiṟ patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyatteva
rkaṉmikkum śrīmākeśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrī kāriyañ cey vāṉukkum Ikkoyil nālām prākārattup piṭāri yokirunta parameśvarikku veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟuppa
tāka Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu kulatipaṉ paḻaṉak kuṭiy piṟinta Irumarapuntūyaperumāḷnallūril tikkeṭṭum veṉṟa perumāḷ kāṇiyāṉa nilattut tirunāmat
tukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta nilam Iruveliyum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Irupattiraṇṭāvatumutal Iṭakkaṭavatākac colli Ippaṭi kaṇak kilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka variyilā
rkku varikkuk kūṟuceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Innilam Irupattiraṇ ṭāvatumutal tirunāmattukkāṇiyum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyumākak kaik koḷḷappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ
tirumantiraolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 2 10 2 ḷ 3 100 2 10 ..svasti śrī .
Digital edition of SII 23.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
